title: hieracium atratiforme subsp. basipellitum
intro: Hieracium atratiforme subsp. basipellitum, also known as a lesser hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae), characterized by its small, yellow flowers and feathery leaves. The medicinal properties of Hieracium atratiforme subsp. basipellitum lie in its potential to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which may contribute to its health benefits. Some studies suggest that this plant may help to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. In herbal preparations, Hieracium atratiforme subsp. basipellitum is often combined with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
